why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official table assigns minecraft:container_close to packet id 0x11, and the official ClientboundContainerClosePacket fixture encodes framed bytes 1107 with body 07 for containerId 7. Stevenarella must dispatch that official id/body without panicking and consume the full body.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panicked in stevenarella/protocol/src/protocol/versions/v26_1_2.rs with bad packet id 0x11 in Clientbound Play, so packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, 0x11, body) did not dispatch the official container_close packet.
answer: oracle/answers/775/play_container_close_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl records packet_type minecraft:container_close, decoded_packet_class net.minecraft.network.protocol.game.ClientboundContainerClosePacket, encoded_framed_hex 1107, encoded_body_hex 07, decoded_container_id 7, and remaining decode byte counts 0.
